quality.rationale: 需构造实验室系四速度并应用洛伦兹Boost求运动观测者分量，逻辑链条完整且具标准粒子物理背景

origin.question: [文件 1: 1_s4_4.13_b.md]4.13 (b) Problem 4.13. A particle of charge $q$ , mass $m$ , moves in a circular orbit of radius $R$ in a uniform B field $\mathbf{B}_{\underline{\mathbf{e}}_z}$ . (b) The speed of the particle is constant since the B field can do no work on the particle. An observer moving at velocity $\beta_{\underline{\mathbf{e}}_{\mathbf{x}}}$ , however, does not see the speed as constant. What is $\mathfrak{u}^{0^{'}}$ measured by this observer?
origin.solution: (b) The 4-velocity components seen in the lab are$$u^{0} = \left(1 - \omega^{2} R^{2}\right)^{- \frac {1} {2}} . \quad u^{x} = \omega y \left(1 - \omega^{2} R^{2}\right)^{- \frac {1} {2}} \quad u^{y} = - \omega x \left(1 - \omega^{2} R^{2}\right)^{- \frac {1} {2}} .The components measured by the moving observer are found with a Lorentz transformation, e.g.$$u^{0^{\prime}} = \gamma (u^{0} - \beta u^{x} ) = \gamma (1 - \beta \omega y ) \left(1 - \omega^{2} R^{2}\right)^{- \frac {1} {2}} ,where $\gamma \equiv (1 - \beta^2)^{-\frac{1}{2}}
